name: ml_model_pipeline
description: Trains the churn prediction model, evaluates it against the champion, and conditionally promotes to production.

tasks.name: fetch_training_data
tasks.description: Reads the latest feature vector snapshot from the offline feature store and splits into train/validation/test sets.

tasks.name: train_model
tasks.description: Trains an XGBoost classifier with Optuna hyperparameter tuning. Logs artifacts to MLflow.

tasks.name: evaluate_model
tasks.description: Computes precision, recall, F1, and AUC-ROC on the held-out test set. Compares against the current champion model.

tasks.name: register_model
tasks.description: Registers the new model version in the MLflow model registry regardless of promotion decision.

tasks.name: promote_model
tasks.description: If the challenger beats the champion on AUC-ROC by >= 0.5%, transitions it to the Production stage in MLflow.
